title: Zero In® Plant Remedy Bug Soap Refill – 200ml, Easy-Mix Concentrate for Insect Control on Houseplants & Greenhouse Herbs from Greenfly, Blackfly, Aphids, Whitefly and Fungus Gnats (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
NATURAL FORMULA: Made with potassium soaps, this soap-based solution is free from harsh chemicals that is safe to use on edible plants
EFFECTIVE INSECT CONTROL: Targets a broad spectrum of common plant pests, including aphids, spider mites, fungus gnats and whiteflies. It works by disrupting the pests' cellular functions

EASY-TO-USE: Simply mix with water (50ml of Bug Soap Refill to 450ml of water) according to the instructions, pour into your spray bottle, and apply to affected plants and surfaces (don't spray directly onto fruit and vegetables or berries, or during the flowering stage)
PRECISION: Bottle has 50ml dosage measurements and resealable precision nozzle for easy and accurate mixing
SUSTAINABLE: Designed as a refill for your existing spray bottle (ZER220), minimising waste and reducing the need for single-use plastic bottles. 200ml concentrate makes 4 x 500ml sprays
